scenario: StatefulSet rolling update stuck — PVC bound to old pod prevents rescheduling
notes: StatefulSet kafka is performing a rolling update. Pod kafka-2 is stuck Pending because its PVC 'data-kafka-2' is bound to the old node 'worker-node-01' which was drained. The new pod cannot be scheduled because the PVC's volumeMode is ReadWriteOnce — only one node can mount it. Fix: delete the stuck PVC so Kubernetes recreates it on the new node, or annotate volume to allow re-binding.
